title: APS Trophies
description: Reward your Players with over 60 unique Cobblemon themed Trophies!
body:
_APS Trophies_ adds over 60 custom Trophies to your Cobblemon pack! Perfect for Tournament Winners, PvE Rewards, Races, and other events.




Annual Pokemon Server is a yearly SMP that focuses on long term gameplay and an immersive world. We are a completely free Cobblemon server! No paid ranks, crates, or ‘Mons. APS blasts off to Outer Space in late 2026! Check out our Discord for more info.


Models were made by **_Dogtor Bloo_**! Check him out for more fantastic assets and art. 
You are welcome to include this mod in your modpack, provided you do not sell anything to your players.
